title: SQL Query
description: JSON Schema representing a SQL query request as used by SQL-over-HTTP APIs and database connectivity tools

sql.example: SELECT id, name, email FROM users WHERE active = true ORDER BY name LIMIT 100

parameters.description: Ordered list of parameter values for parameterized queries (? placeholders or $1, $2, etc.)

namedParameters.description: Named parameter key/value pairs for named placeholder queries (:name or @name style)

maxRows.description: Maximum number of rows to return from a SELECT query

database.description: Target database or schema name when the connection supports multiple
